title: Wood Carvings
description:
You open a dusty box to find a set of 3 elaborate wood carvings:

A bird, snake, and... a torus?

A nearby pedestal has indentations which match the bottom of the carvings. Which carving will you place on the pedestal?

options.title: Snake
options.requires: None of your cards can be Enchanted with [purple]Slither[/purple].

options.title: Torus
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] starter card to [gold]Transform[/gold] into [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold].

conditions: At least 1 removable Basic card in deck
notes: The [gold]Bird[/gold] and [gold]Torus[/gold] options let you select a transformable Basic card from your deck and permanently replace it with [gold]Peck[/gold] or [gold]Toric Toughness[/gold] respectively. The [purple]Snake[/purple] option lets you select any Slither-compatible card from your deck to enchant — it is not limited to Basic cards, but is locked if no card in your deck can receive the [purple]Slither[/purple] enchantment (excludes X-cost and Unplayable cards).
